locations.name: Srinagar
locations.description: Capital city — airport, houseboats, Mughal gardens, old city markets.

locations.name: Gulmarg
locations.description: Ski resort and gondola — 50 km from Srinagar via Tangmarg.

locations.name: Pahalgam
locations.description: Lidder Valley base — 95 km south-east of Srinagar.

locations.name: Sonamarg
locations.description: Thajiwas Glacier — 80 km north-east on Srinagar–Leh highway.

locations.name: Srinagar–Leh Highway
locations.description: 434 km high-altitude road via Kargil. Open roughly May–Oct. Permit check at Sonamarg.
